summary: P1 Integration testing completed. Verified UnifiedPhotoCard integration on MintedPhotos page with new 'Card View' toggle. Card View displays 7 photos with flip animation showing stats on back. FaceDetectionService (face-api.js) is installed and integrated in SelfieMatchModal. Backend APIs verified - full-stats endpoint returns all required fields. All 21 backend tests passed (2 skipped).

minor.issue: Stamina values inconsistent - current_stamina=100 but max_stamina=24 in test data
selfie_match_completed and selfie_match_score fields not included in list response (only in full-stats)

issues: Stamina shows 100/24 which is visually confusing - should normalize to max_stamina

action_items: Consider normalizing stamina values in test data (current_stamina should not exceed max_stamina)
Consider adding selfie_match_completed field to minted photos list endpoint for Face Match button visibility
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Card View toggle button appears in MintedPhotos toolbar with title='Card View (Flip for Stats)'
VERIFIED: UnifiedPhotoCard renders correctly with 7 photo cards in Card View mode
VERIFIED: Card flip animation works - shows 'Total Power' and 'Authenticity' on back side
VERIFIED: face-api.js v0.22.2 installed and integrated in FaceDetectionService
VERIFIED: SelfieMatchModal imports faceDetectionService and has real-time face detection overlay
VERIFIED: Full-stats endpoint returns all required fields for UnifiedPhotoCard (21 fields verified)
NOTE: face-api.js shows 'fs' module warning in browser - this is expected and non-critical
NOTE: No photos have has_face=true in test data, so Face Match button not visible (expected)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Integration verified. MintedPhotos page has 3 view modes: Grid (default), Card (new - uses UnifiedPhotoCard with flip), List. Card View shows 'Tap to flip' text and flips to show stats. FaceDetectionService uses face-api.js from CDN. SelfieMatchModal has real-time face detection overlay. Test photos don't have has_face=true so Face Match button won't appear. PhotoGameArena page loads correctly with PVP Battle Arena options.

face_detection_service.note: 'fs' module warning is expected in browser environment

mocked_apis_list: Facebook Graph API for engagement reactions
